title: Relocating the delete button within a text column
excerpt: Is there a way we can relocate this delete button within the text column field? I’ve had multiple users comment about this button being easily clickable and it goes to delete all the text within it with no way to undo it…

posts.author: paulinlalasko (Paulina Laskowska)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way we can relocate this delete button within the text column field? I’ve had multiple users comment about this button being easily clickable and it goes to delete all the text within it with no way to undo it. Thanks so much!
